body_preview: - Day 114 04:21 session fixed the word-boundary bug in test-result signals and added src/*.rs preference for reverted_no_edit pressure. The assessment confirms this specific bug is RESOLVED. - However, the broader analysis-only/no-edit pressure path in preseed still lacks self-tests. When `task_analysis_only_attempt_count` or analysis-only pressure is high,
expected_evidence: Preseed --test output shows new test cases for analysis-only pressure Future task manifests show landable Files entries for task-success repair pressure Future trajectory pressure leads with implementation failure repair when analysis-only counts are elevated Implementation Notes: This task was seeded by the harness before planner exploration because recent

title: Make analysis-only task pressure landable
